campaign_status: ARC 1-8 COMPLETE. ARC 9: THE NETWORK — 10/14 Keepers integrated. Hub Three response ~5 months. ARC 12: THE FIRST NOTE — Source Node Seven contacted, Substrate-Zero discovered. ARC 13: THE CROSSING — Vel'thara Trust 10 (MAXIMUM), hybrid tree growing. Phase 4 critical study COMPLETE (Blocks 3,5,6-critical; Block 4 derived by Sylvara+Aelindris+Root). Bridgesong Lens OPERATIONAL (universal frequency detection, no Diadem needed). First Substrate-Zero threshold Vel'tarn↔Greymoor OPERATIONAL (self-sustaining, permanent, zero power). 6 thresholds total. 3 resonance-keeled flatboats COMPLETE (launch Solstice Day 120). Midsummer Festival Day 100 (28 golds). Flatboat christening Day 103. Consultations complete (Listener, Aelindris, Sylvara, Vaelen) — hybrid curriculum path. Healer-musician training active (Ellyn/Salthollow). Tier 2 rolling. Vel'krath operational. Greymoor Finishing Works producing. Ashport timber regulation complete. Seed amplification 2.8x derived. Geological reader 60%. Aelindris drafting Architect school curriculum. Millhaven monthly teacher run (Lila). CHECK calendar-hooks.md FOR UPCOMING EVENTS.
marriage: Zaryth Vel'quinar married Sylvara Dawnwhisper, 30th Goldmere 1255 AS. The Gardener officiated. 180 guests. Memory tree recorded.

kaelryn.name: Kaelryn Vel'quinar
kaelryn.appearance: Obsidian-black skin, silver-white hair, violet eyes with amber-gold flecks
kaelryn.resonance: Dual-frequency (Root silver-white + Lattice amber-gold). First recorded dual-network biological entity.
kaelryn.world_symbol: Small circle inside larger circle — child (invented for her)
kaelryn.silver_tree: Bloomed at moment of birth. First time in 3,000 years.
kaelryn.naming_ceremony: Day 834, 24th Reaptide. Aelindris presided. Sea water anointing (Lakan-Diwa). Name spoken into Root network (planetary). Kaelryn's Garden hymn (Orindel nat 20). Tidal pearl gift from Kapuluan.
kaelryn.tidal_pearl: Black tidal pearl from Puso ng Dagat reef. Kapuluan gift. Resonates with her frequency.

the_velmoran: LAUNCHED. Dragon turtle shell hull + ancient hardwood frame. Autonomous dual-network vessel. Operational.
baby: Girl. Due ~Day 960, Reaptide 1256. Dual-frequency resonance. Lakan-Diwa (primary midwife) + Aldric + Orindel + Seren. Coral basin in family suite. Memory tree recording.
coral_basin: Active in family suite, Vel'tarn. Living coral cutting from Puso ng Dagat. Ocean frequency in the nursery.

monster_kills.old_ashfang: Young Red Dragon CR10. 1 round, 0 damage taken.
monster_kills.maw_of_ashfire: Dragon Turtle CR17. 1 round, 0 damage taken.
monster_kills.the_broodmother: Deep Ankheg CR13. 1 round, 0 damage taken.

ward_status.network: ALL 14 NODES + 7 PLANTINGS ACTIVE. Agricultural ward (Template #3) on Node 7. Root explored — root system spans entire continent + ocean floor to western landmass. Natural Heartstone deposits growing in bedrock (self-sustaining). 412 planting sites identified (Root-prepared).
ward_status.stations: Fenhollow (91%, 8 Heartstones, agricultural ward), Aelindra (58%), Ashara (fortified), Vel'arath (91%, demilitarized, Knowledge Accord)

plantings.stones_memory: The Anvil (D2). Day 92, 1252. 3-mile dome. Stonehearth tending.
plantings.grandmothers_promise: Tidemouth (E26). Day 8, 1253. All 7 Shelf hearthstones synchronized.
plantings.rivers_ear: Listening Dark (underground, 800 ft). Day 164, 1253. Cylindrical dome, 1 mi tunnel.
plantings.crystal_choir: Crystalvein Junction (underground, 600 ft). Day 166, 1253. Crystal-amplified, 2 mi.
plantings.unbroken_dark: Beneath Vel'arath (underground, 1200 ft). Day 168, 1253. 4-mile dome. Named by Nhilara.

the_world.status: CONTACTED. Day 183-184, 1253. Planetary intelligence, 4 billion years old. Communicates through geometric patterns. First conversation in history. Asked for company. The Dawnwatch is the bridge.
the_world.hearthstone: World's Hearthstone — permanent communication link. Place on round table. Projection 1/day. Tremor sense 120 ft. The World attends celebrations.
the_world.key_revelations: Drow are the World's closest children. Dwarves hear the World unconsciously. Halfling luck = World's fondness. Fey = perpendicular beings from thin points. Pre-Gardener magic was raw/unstructured. Races are partial resonance-cultivars. Other planetary intelligences exist. Deep ocean entities unknown even to the World.
the_world.relationship: The World, the Root, and the Gardener are now in communication via the Dawnwatch. Three-way bridge. The World invented the symbol 'Home' (curves + angles merged). d100: 100 on the bridge moment.

gardener.name: Aelindris
gardener.status: Physical. Recovering. Teaching. Name revealed: Aelindris. Sat at the round table for the first time. Reunited with the Root. Met the World. Connected to the Listener.

the_root.status: Alive. Crystal tree, 20 ft. Speaks. Sense of humor. Root system spans continent + ocean floor. Growing natural Heartstones. Reunited with Gardener. Met the World.
the_root.heart_fruit: With Zaryth. Direct communication + Network Pulse + Root Sense.

the_listener.status: AWAKE. Hub Seven online. 3,217-year quarantine ended. Root Seat planted. 31,847 messages decoded. Orbital relay connected.
the_listener.crucible: OPERATIONAL. Producing Lattice alloy, Lattice-grade ward-ink, seed crystals. Geothermal powered.
the_listener.seed_vault: OPERATIONAL. Producing 1 seed crystal per 7 days. Self-replenishing.
the_listener.archive: 4 levels. Tender design documents. Gardener manuals. Star charts. Complete Lattice Engineering curriculum.
the_listener.threshold: K7 (Tidemeet coastal bedrock, 200ft) ↔ Listener Chamber. Permanent. Diadem-controlled.

the_tenders.status: Identified. Builders of the Lattice, creators of the Gardeners. Left 7,400 years ago to tend the larger garden. No contact since. Final message: Grow well.

tender_cache.status: OPENED Day 900. First of 23 on this planet.
tender_cache.contents: 12 Tender-grade seeds, 8 Tender-grade alloy ingots (12 remaining after flatboat+threshold use), 3 threshold anchor sets (1 used for Crucible↔Shaft9), 6 resonance key blanks, 1 maintenance tool set, 1 crystal tablet (23 cache locations + 6 other hub worlds)

substrate_zero.status: DISCOVERED Day 53, 1257. 780ft under Greymoor. Planetary foundation material.
substrate_zero.description: Bridge mineral — conducts Root + Lattice natively. Golden-ratio harmonic (1.618x Root base). Predates Tenders, predates geology. Tender designation: Substrate-Zero.
substrate_zero.deposits: 11 on this continent. Greymoor is the largest.
substrate_zero.samples: 3 extracted (Alpha 2.1lb flawless, Beta 0.8lb excellent, Gamma 0.2lb good). At Vel'tarn.
substrate_zero.applications: Self-sustaining thresholds (no power source needed), universal network bridge (all frequencies), seed amplification (3x maturation), 44 more in Phase 4 curriculum.
substrate_zero.source_node: Source Node Seven. 900ft under Greymoor. Sphere, 2ft diameter, deep amber-bronze. Predates rock formation. FIRST RECIPROCAL CONTACT in 11,000 years across 31 worlds. 'Can matter learn to sing?' Connected to 30 other source nodes via sub-Lattice threads.
substrate_zero.tender_message: Priority Zero unsealed (7 seals, 7,400 years). Tenders studied Substrate-Zero for 11,000 years across 31 worlds, never determined what it is. Built entire Lattice to interface with it. Chose hub worlds because of source nodes. Never told Gardeners. Left message for whoever found it next.
substrate_zero.root_revelation: Root grew from/toward Substrate-Zero for 3,000 years. 'I was not growing toward it. I was growing from it.' Source node heartbeat = 47 bpm = Root pulse = Kaelryn's resting heart rate.
substrate_zero.world_reaction: The World felt its own foundation for the first time in 4 billion years. 'I have never been surprised before today.'
substrate_zero.map_of_31_worlds: In Diadem. 31 source nodes, connected by sub-Lattice threads. Original network beneath everything.

resonance_geophone.status: Mk I COMPLETE Day 905 1256. Designed by Aldren + Zaryth + Dawnwatch collaboration.
resonance_geophone.capabilities: 5-axis triangulation, 4000ft water range, 8000ft stone range, full Lattice + Root + biological frequency detection, Root-network reference grid
resonance_geophone.future: Planetary sensor network (14 units at Keepers) planned after Mk I proven.

workshop.status: COMPLETE. Two-story. Ground: alchemy lab + tinkering + Aldren instruments. Second floor: cartography studio + Lattice Engineering workspace. Lattice alloy brackets. Ward-circuit lighting.

hub_contacts.hub_three: Surviving Gardener. 847-year signal. Response sent. 14-month transit. 94.2% probability living Gardener.
hub_contacts.hub_four: Active independently 200 years. Listener attempting contact.
hub_contacts.hub_twelve: Reclassified: sealed (probable). Fragment data confirms containment protocol successful 3,200 years ago. Gardener Vel'sorath reported Root integration at 40%.

aldren_voss.status: Integrated. Workshop operational (2-story). Building marine Resonance Geophone. Working with Corwin + Seren.
aldren_voss.instrument: The Geophone — brass, quartz, tuning forks. Mundane Lattice detector.

alon_ng_araw.status: LAUNCHED Day 880. Maiden voyage to Kapuluan. Operational. Lattice alloy self-optimizing.
alon_ng_araw.type: Autonomous hybrid vessel. Lattice alloy fittings. Deep coral reef sensors. Fire opal navigation.

vel_thara_crossing.status: COMPLETE Day 69, 1257. First mortal to perceive Vel'thara plane.
vel_thara_crossing.method: Diadem-mediated awareness projection through aperture. Orindel anchor melody. Seren vitals monitoring.
vel_thara_crossing.resonance_hall: Visited. Children's clay bowl on display — only material object in the Vel'thara plane.
vel_thara_crossing.tender_seed_planted: d100: 100. Hybrid tree growing in frequency-soil. Matter + frequency merged. First new life in Vel'thara plane in 10,000 years. All 12 harmonies sang spontaneously.
gifts_received: Listening Stone (anyone can hear Source Node 47bpm, no attunement)
Boundary map (ward network from Vel'thara side, Source Node pillar visible)
vel_thara_crossing.invitation: Standing — return with Kaelryn. 'She will hear things even you cannot.'

vel_thara_healing_frequencies.status: RECEIVED Day 62. 7 frequencies. Non-magical, music-based. Teachable to any musician (7 days each).
vel_thara_healing_frequencies.integration: Being added to healer training program. Every graduate learns at least 3.

vel_sharen_accord: HOLDING + KNOWLEDGE ACCORD. Joint underground planting. Shared lab. Ydrael permanent liaison. Kael annual study. Mutual defense.

vel_mora.status: PHASE 1 COMPLETE. ALL 5 RACES CONTACTED. Kah-sol connected. Trade embassies. Keeper training.
vel_mora.kah_sol: Network intelligence, alien, 800 years, lonely, wants connection. Connected. Seed planted in Deep Forest.

kapuluan.status: ALLIED. Trade accord sealed. Puso ng Dagat active. Bakunawa harmonized.
kapuluan.contacts: Datu Malaya (chief), Lakan-Diwa (Babaylan, at Vel'tarn), Tala (navigator/trade), Bulan (Deep Fisher), Kapitan Habagat (Voyager elder), Guro council (12 masters)
kapuluan.planting: 4/47 planted, 3 certified activators (Guro Alon, Bulan, Tala), independent ops

puso_ng_dagat: ACTIVE. Major dual-network node. Reef junction K13, 40ft underwater. Triple-frequency (Root + kah-sol + coral + volcanic). Entire Kapuluan reef connected to planetary grid. The World can feel the sea.

fleet.eilistraees_grace: Lyriel. Northern express + expedition. Crew: Maren Ashfall (experienced), Fen (Drow trainee). Operational.
fleet.tidecaller: Revelle Ashcroft. Deep-water exploration + salvage. 60/40 split. Corwin Hale navigator.
fleet.seedhome: Anchored Tidemeet. Forge (100%), archive (412 charts, 61 templates, 47 songs, 47 tools), Root Seed.
fleet.the_velmoran: LAUNCHED. Dragon turtle shell hull + ancient hardwood frame. Autonomous dual-network vessel. Operational.
fleet.kapuluan_trade_route: Active. Southern Archipelago ↔ Tidemeet. Trade accord sealed.

homestead.hall: Hall of the Dawnwatch — COMPLETE. Round table (10+6). Trophy gallery. Memorial alcove. Sculpture. Ward-circuit. World's Hearthstone (to be placed).
homestead.school: 16 students. Music + Vel'thara curriculum. Dawnwatch Ensemble (6 members, 7+ pieces).
homestead.agricultural_ward: Template #3 on Node 7. Double crops. Silver sage hybrid. 10-acre charter.
homestead.alchemy_line: Greater Healing Potions, elixirs, salves, Stormfire Flasks. ~250 gp/month.

vel_quinar.status: DEBT-FREE. Resonance moss lighting. Spider-silk industry (resonance fabric). Southern crops. Kael (song-inheritor). Fen joined (17th member, escaped Vel'arath independently).
vel_quinar.prodigy: Kael Vel'quinar — harp, age 14, Gardener's chosen
vel_quinar.vel_krath: Crucible settlement OPERATIONAL. Dren (smith), Thorn (security), Velyndra (crystal cutter). Threshold commute to Vel'tarn.

prisoners_probation.ashara: Probation. Translating Gardener inscriptions (60%+). Moonpetal research. Trending redemption. Accompanied Seedhome expedition.

full_planet.western_landmass: ~2,400x1,200 mi. 300,000 pop. 5 races (Tall Ones, Stone Singers, River Folk, Wind Runners, Deep Ones). Raw geometric magic. No wards. 23 planting sites.
full_planet.southern_archipelago: Hundreds of islands. 50,000 pop. Sailing culture. Mixed magic. 47 planting sites. KAPULUAN CONTACTED — trade accord, Bakunawa harmonized, Puso ng Dagat active.
full_planet.volcanic_south: 600x400 mi. 20,000 pop. Obsidian/coral builders. Elemental magic. 12 planting sites.
full_planet.northern_ice: 1,500x300 mi. 5,000 pop. Nomadic. Dormant geometry. 8 planting sites.
full_planet.deep_ocean: Unknown entities. 78 planting sites. The World doesn't fully understand what's down there.

tournament_record: 26 golds, 5 silvers (Duskport 1248, Veldmere 1249, Harrowgate 1252, Midsummer Fenhollow 1256, Reaping Fair Fenhollow 1256)

legendary_items.dawnsedge: Longsword +3. 1d8+5 + 1d6 lightning + 1d6 radiant. Gardener's Strike (stun on crit). Sunburst (6d6 radiant AoE 1/LR).
legendary_items.roots_heart_fruit: Direct Root communication. Network Pulse (continental broadcast 1/LR). Root Sense.
legendary_items.firstsong: Legendary lute. BI d8. Planting radius x2. First Song (10 temp HP + save adv 1/LR).
legendary_items.silver_leaf: Master key. Both vessels. All systems.
legendary_items.worlds_hearthstone: Permanent World communication. Projection 1/day. Tremor sense 120 ft. The World at the table.
legendary_items.duskfang: Nhilara. Ren-kah scimitar +2, cold damage, Resonance Howl, Aberration Bane.
legendary_items.listeners_frequency_key: Geometric pattern. Diadem-compatible. Direct communication with any Listener in the network.
legendary_items.listening_stone: Vel'thara gift. Crystallized frequency, golden-ratio spiral inside. Anyone holding it hears Source Node 47bpm pulse. No attunement. Passive.
legendary_items.bridgesong_lens: Sylvara + Aldren. Substrate-Zero focal lens + Geophone housing. Universal frequency detection (Root, Lattice, Vel'thara, Source Node, biological, geological). No Diadem. No attunement. Anyone can use. Manufacturable (10/month at Vel'krath).

legendary_weapons.dawnsedge: Zaryth. Longsword +3. 1d8+5 + 1d6 lightning + 1d6 radiant. Gardener's Strike. Sunburst.
legendary_weapons.duskfang: Nhilara. Ren-kah scimitar +2, cold damage, Resonance Howl, Aberration Bane.

legendary_armor.resonance_elk_upgrades: All 12 members have resonance-elk upgraded armor.
